doc_content.summary: Core session management skill that coordinates startup context hydration and automated wind-down operations. It handles reading background documentation, running sanity health checks, aggregating project/PR state, executing automated test/build commands, committing routine documentation updates, and synchronizing state with GitHub Projects.
key_features: Automated Git and GitHub Project state aggregation on start
Guided teardown with automated PR merging via configurable strategies
Automated documentation staging, devlog generation, and cross-repo project board sync

alt_text: An HTML dashboard visualizing the internals of the stark-session engineering skill, including start/end mode execution flowcharts, config hierarchy mapping, parameter tables, and failure recovery protocols.
